sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93818" key="shmei/wma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σημεί-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n93818.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">records, Vit Philonid.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.11</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
